text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, is it true? Did you really score a ninety on
the last test?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Are you a machine?! You work as a model
too—when did you study?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I found time? Not like I'm doing anything in my
trailer otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I getcha... This super trailer is making you a
genius, right? C'mon, bestie, let me take it for a
spin. ☆

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Uh... it's just a trailer. Besides, trespassing would
get you in more trouble than any test.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh... You've got a make-up test, right? What parts didn't you understand?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you're seriously gonna help me?! No way!
Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, why not. I'm not going to leave my "bestie"
hanging.
